4.4 Study drug exposure, and rescue therapy

4.5.1.1 Visual	acuity	of	at	least	0.7	logMAR	30	(±5) days after treatment (primary	
endpoint)

4.5.1.2 Visual	acuity	of	at	least	0.5	logMAR	30	(±5) and 90 (±15) days after treatment
(secondary endpoint)
